Walkscape Walkthrough

Tip of the day
If there's maintenance, don't worry, usually your steps will still count during the downtime. Check the Discord announcements to be sure!

Tortoise

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Namespaces

  • Page
  • Discussion

Page actions

This page contains changes which are not marked for translation.
Other languages:
  • English
Normal PetRare Pet
Tortoise
(Adult)
Static:

A reserved tortoise, just holding steady. Slowly, but steadily.

Tortoise is a pet. It hatches from a Tortoise egg.

Requirement To Gain Experience

  • Not doing Agility.

Names

These are the default names this pet can have when it first hatches:

  • Addy
  • Crush
  • Donnie
  • Harriet
  • Michelle
  • Mikey
  • Mort
  • Sheldon
  • Squirt
  • Tank

Precious Tortoise
(Adult)
Static:

The shell of this tortoise has the shine of precious metals in the shape of a flower!

Precious Tortoise is a rare pet. It hatches from a rare Tortoise egg.

Requirement To Gain Experience

  • Not doing Agility.

Names

These are the default names this pet can have when it first hatches:

  • Addy
  • Crush
  • Donnie
  • Harriet
  • Michelle
  • Mikey
  • Mort
  • Sheldon
  • Squirt
  • Tank

Contents

  • 1 Egg
    • 1.1 Experience To Hatch
  • 2 Juvenile
    • 2.1 Experience To Grow
    • 2.2 Attributes
  • 3 Adult
    • 3.1 Ability
    • 3.2 Attributes
  • 4 Trivia

Egg

Tortoise
(Egg)
Static:

This pet is an Egg from level 0 to level 1.

Experience To Hatch

  • Requires an additional 35,000 experience to advance to level 1. (35,000 total experience required)
    • This pet will become a Juvenile when it reaches level 1.

Juvenile

NormalLightDarkRare
Tortoise
(Juvenile)
Static:

Tortoise
(Juvenile)
Static:

Tortoise
(Juvenile)
Static:

Precious Tortoise
(Juvenile)
Static:

This pet is a Juvenile from level 1 to 4.

Experience To Grow

  • Requires an additional 50,000 experience to advance to level 2. (85,000 total experience required)
  • Requires an additional 65,000 experience to advance to level 3. (150,000 total experience required)
  • Requires an additional 100,000 experience to advance to level 4. (250,000 total experience required)
    • This pet will become an Adult when it reaches level 4.

Attributes

Level Attributes
1 -15% Work efficiency While doing Agility.
+1% Work efficiency While doing Smithing.
+2% Bonus experience While doing Smithing.
Global +2 Inventory space
2 -10% Work efficiency While doing Agility.
+2% Work efficiency While doing Smithing.
+4% Bonus experience While doing Smithing.
Global +3 Inventory space
3 -5% Work efficiency While doing Agility.
+3% Work efficiency While doing Smithing.
+6% Bonus experience While doing Smithing.
Global +4 Inventory space

Adult

NormalLightDarkRare
Tortoise
(Adult)
Static:

Tortoise
(Adult)
Static:

Tortoise
(Adult)
Static:

Precious Tortoise
(Adult)
Static:

This pet is an Adult at level 4.

Ability

This ability is unlocked at level 4.

   Shell Forge
Effect Requirement Cooldowns Charges
Completes 5 Smelting actions instantly. While doing Smelting recipes. 4,000 steps
Not doing Agility. 		10
Your Tortoise takes a bundle of your smelting materials and retreats with them into its shell next to the furnace. You feel a sudden wave of heat and see it return with the resulting spoils.

Attributes

Level Attributes
4 +4% Work efficiency While doing Smithing.
+8% Bonus experience While doing Smithing.
Global +2 Bonus experience
While doing Smelting recipes.
Global +5 Inventory space
-1 Steps required While doing Smithing.

Trivia


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
